agency: Bank (bank passbook copy) / Municipal office (銀行通帳 / 市区町村役場)
nameEn: Proof of Timely Resident Tax Payments
nameJa: 住民税を適正な時期に納めていることを証明する資料
conditionNote: Required only if resident tax was NOT withheld at source (特別徴収 / payroll deduction) during any part of the past 3 years. If tax was withheld at source for the entire 3-year period, submit only #7 and #8.
noteEn: Web banking screenshots showing transaction history are acceptable. If unable to submit, include a written explanation (理由書).
noteJa: 住民税が特別徴収されていない期間がある方のみ提出。Web通帳の画面写しも可。提出困難な場合は理由書を提出。
